scripts.build:templates: bun run build:engine-templates && bun run scripts/embed-templates.ts
scripts.build:binary: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --outfile dist/relic --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="npm"'
scripts.build:npm: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --target node --outfile packages/cli-node/dist/relic.js --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="npm"' && node scripts/fix-shebang.mjs
scripts.publish:npm: bun run build:npm && cd packages/cli-node && npm publish --access public
scripts.build:pypi:linux-x64: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile packages/cli-python/relic/relic --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="pypi"'
scripts.build:pypi:linux-arm64: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --target bun-linux-arm64 --outfile packages/cli-python/relic/relic --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="pypi"'
scripts.build:pypi:macos-x64: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile packages/cli-python/relic/relic --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="pypi"'
scripts.build:pypi:macos-arm64: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile packages/cli-python/relic/relic --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="pypi"'
scripts.build:pypi:windows-x64: bun run build:templates && bun build packages/cli-node/src/bin.ts --compile --target bun-windows-x64 --outfile packages/cli-python/relic/relic.exe --define 'INSTALL_CHANNEL="pypi"'
